flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clackamas Community College fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (20.7% → 15.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clackamas Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.6k → $6.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clackamas Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clackamas Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (58.9% → 66.0%).
